neighborhoods.name: Downtown / Millionaires Row
neighborhoods.description: Historic lumber baron district with Victorian mansions, Community Arts Center, and Little League museum
neighborhoods.character: Victorian lumber baron, Little League heritage, arts

housing.predominantType: Victorian houses, apartments, and historic conversions

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Williamsport. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: South Williamsport
neighborhoods.description: Southern borough across the river with Little League World Series complex and residential neighborhoods
neighborhoods.character: Little League World Series, residential, community
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Williamsport's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Jersey Shore / Lock Haven
neighborhoods.description: Surrounding communities with very affordable housing, Susquehanna River access, and rural character

housing.predominantType: Modest houses, older homes, and affordable properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Montoursville / Muncy
neighborhoods.description: Eastern communities with good schools, community parks, and family-oriented small-town living
neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
